title: What do you guys thing abt Trade.ai ??
author: Active_Surprise_9036
selftext:
hey guys

so i recently found this website called [trade.ai](http://trade.ai) and its kinda interesting

basically it lets you create your own ai trading coach, like it asks you about your strategy, your goals, your last trades etc and then it kinda guides you to stick to your rules and stay disciplined

i just bought it and started testing it but not sure yet if its actually good or just another tool that sounds nice but doesnt change much

anyone here already tried it ?? curious to know if its actually worth using long term or not
